sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40395" key="e)pioinoxoeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιοινοχοεύω</orth>, <sense id="n40395.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pour out wine for</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεοῖς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg005.perseus-grc1:204" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">204</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
